summary: Found two compatibility regressions in the new Google Vertex REST fallback. The intended `authorized_user` ADC path is covered by the new unit test, but the custom stream is selected based only on the presence of an authorized-user ADC file and does not preserve all `@google/genai` Vertex URL/model semantics.

actions.reason: ClawSweeper found an actionable commit-level bug/regression candidate.
